risk: The source scaffold is incomplete and must not replace the stock module.
Incorrect gpio_button_data offsets can corrupt kernel memory.
GPIO, IRQ and timer behavior cannot be certified by static evidence alone.
rollback: No device or partition operation is permitted during offline stages.
Build outputs remain outside the canonical source directory.
A future hardware test must preserve the stock module and define unbind, unload and reboot recovery before execution.
promotion_rule: Require all 24 microtasks, KCFI, Assembly, imports, ABI, independent review and controlled hardware validation to pass.
